关.wiki_summary: Wiktionary labels 關 as a phono-semantic compound (形聲, OC *kroːn): semantic 門 ('door') + phonetic 𢇅 (two wooden sticks forming a latch), noting the bronze form may already carry a phonetic element.
关.difference: Our data calls it a pictograph (citing the bronze inscription), but Wiktionary's primary label for the transmitted form is phono-semantic compound.

点.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound (形聲, OC *teːmʔ): semantic 黑 ('black') + phonetic 占.

正.wiki_summary: Wiktionary labels 正 as a phono-semantic compound (形聲, OC *tjeŋ): phonetic 丁 + semantic 止 ('foot').
正.difference: Our data classifies 正 as a simple indicative (指事), but Wiktionary identifies it as a phono-semantic compound with 丁 as the phonetic and 止 as the semantic component.

业.wiki_summary: Pictogram of a beam from which bells and chimes hang.

外.wiki_summary: Wiktionary labels 外 as a phono-semantic compound (形聲, OC *ŋʷaːds): semantic 卜 + phonetic 月.
外.difference: Our data classifies 外 as a compound ideograph (会意, 夕+卜), but Wiktionary identifies it as a phono-semantic compound with 月 as the phonetic and 卜 as the semantic component.

将.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound (形聲, OC *ʔsaŋ): phonetic 爿 + semantic ⺼ ('meat') + semantic 寸 ('hand'), originally meaning 'to offer meat as tribute'.

两.wiki_summary: Ideogrammic compound (會意): 一 + 㒳, representing two paired objects.

间.wiki_summary: Wiktionary describes 間 as a variant of 閒, which is an ideogrammic compound (會意): 門 ('door') + 月/日 ('moon'/'sun') – moonlight or daylight peeking through a door.
间.difference: Our data classifies 間 as a phono-semantic compound (門 semantic + 日 phonetic), but Wiktionary treats it as a variant of the ideogrammic compound 閒 (門 + 月/日), with no phonetic role assigned to 日.

由.wiki_summary: Pictogram of new shoots or leaves growing from a plant stalk.
